requirements.summary: Regenerate the Ray Infotech branded logo image with correct spelling and update the frontend to use the corrected logo
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image displays the brand name as exactly 'Ray Infotech' with correct spelling
All characters in the logo text are clearly legible and correctly formed
The updated logo is rendered in the hero section of the HomePage at /assets/generated/ray-infotech-logo.png
The logo maintains the deep navy and gold color palette consistent with the existing theme

file_operations.description: Update the hero section to reference the corrected logo image at frontend/public/assets/generated/ray-infotech-logo.dim_400x200.png, ensuring the img src uses /assets/generated/ray-infotech-logo.png and the alt text clearly identifies it as the Ray Infotech logo with correct spelling

Update the header logo reference to use the corrected logo image at frontend/public/assets/generated/ray-infotech-logo.dim_400x120.png, ensuring the img src uses /assets/generated/ray-infotech-logo.png and maintains proper dimensions and accessibility attributes
